_comment: Production defaults only — NO secrets here. Connection strings, Jwt:SigningKey, Security:DataProtection:Key, Kestrel cert, etc. are supplied at deploy time via environment variables (Section__Key) or Azure Key Vault (set KeyVault:Uri). See docs/DEPLOYMENT.md.

Tenancy._comment: Production is host-based: requests resolve to a tenant by the domain in platform.TenantDomain (e.g. his.hospital.in -> HIS). DevDefaultTenant is the fallback when no host matches; keep it at the production tenant, never a demo tenant.
